title: Task queue payload schemas
description: Redis task queue message payloads for both Dialed queues. Queues use Redis Lists (LPUSH/BRPOP). Both payloads are simple JSON with no nested objects.

dateTime.description: An ISO 8601 date-time string with timezone (e.g. 2026-03-18T12:00:00Z)

IngestionJobPayload.description: Payload published to the 'dialed:ingestion' Redis queue when a file upload triggers an ingestion job. The worker reads this to locate the file and associate results with the correct session.

job_id.description: ID of the telemetry.ingestion_jobs record that tracks this job's state

session_id.description: ID of the core.sessions session this ingestion will populate

user_id.description: ID of the user who triggered this ingestion. Used for authorization checks within the worker.

source.description: Ingestion pipeline to invoke. csv = AiM/compatible data logger file; ocr = setup sheet photo; voice = audio note.

file_path.description: Absolute path to the uploaded file on shared blob storage (e.g. /storage/uploads/abc123.csv). The worker reads from this path.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this payload was enqueued. Used for job age monitoring and stale-job sweeps.

AiJobPayload.description: Payload published to the 'dialed:ai' Redis queue when a suggestion generation request is received. The worker fetches all required context (session, bike, history) from Core API via HTTP before calling Claude.

job_id.description: ID of the ai.generation_jobs record that tracks this job's state

session_id.description: ID of the core.sessions session a suggestion is being generated for. The worker fetches session data, bike specs, telemetry summary, and change history using this ID.

user_id.description: ID of the user who requested the suggestion. Forwarded in inter-service HTTP calls via X-Internal-Token.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this payload was enqueued. Used for job age monitoring and stale-job sweeps.
